title: Vaders Ported: Mickey Joes Stacked VIT Barely Default Items Pack
description: (1.21.5 — 1.21.6+) Give items unique textures based on its stack size in Vanilla for Default. Ported from @MushirMickeyJoe's Barely Default. 'V1.0.0'
body:
<center>

**[https://ko-fi.com/vaderman24](https://ko-fi.com/vaderman24)**

**V1.0.0 For Minecraft Java Edition 1.21.5 — 1.21.6+**

**([🔥CURSEFORGE⚒️](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/mickey-joes-stacked-vit-barely-default-items-pack))**

**([🌎PLANET MINECRAFT⛏️](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/mickey-joe-s-stacked-vit-barely-default-items-pack-default-items-add-on-1-21-5-1-21-6/))**

**———————————————————————————————————————————**

**Also check out these other related Resource Packs**

**[Barely Default](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mickey-joes-relatively-improved-default)** By **[@MushirMickeyJoe](https://www.youtube.com/@MushirMickeyJoe)** [​16x] [​JE]

(1.21.5+) **[Vader's Ported: Mickey Joe's Stacked VIT 'Barely Default' Items Pack](https://docs.google.com/document/d/12EYjWpwJYqRFpgVvn-OwVsrOnjbSViIvYZx95laqHgo/edit?usp=sharing)** [​16x] [​JE]

(1.11 — 1.12) **[Vader's Stacked CIT Programmer Items Pack](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/16x16-vaders-stacked-items-pack---stack-your-items-with-optifine/)** [​16x] [​JE]

**———————————————————————————————————————————**

For all the renamable item textures **[go to this Google Docs page](https://docs.google.com/document/d/12EYjWpwJYqRFpgVvn-OwVsrOnjbSViIvYZx95laqHgo/edit?tab=t.5e2qecfbsvng)**

**———————————————————————————————————————————**

![🗣️Aboutℹ️](https://lh7-us.googleusercontent.com/docsz/AD_4nXeWpYTR8aeRHbUXOXjVqlXPnXe77xEn-Mf1E159NndL5k7RuLjlFsWOIUf52gS_1jiWM9g7g2cXyE-ikzNZF8CSCI7yeJePIIPMyhFVGKiJBI7J5XNK_FCtagNAwS3fmXjHUcLG_4fu4gQApKy3CidpB6sn?key=TbQixWWh_bnxOhj6JlQVUA)

**Summary:** Give items unique textures based on its stack size in Vanilla for Default.

This pack Gives items unique textures based on its stack size in Vanilla for Default. It also adds 3d item models, animated items, renameable items, and replacement textures.

This pack is a stand-alone port of the stacked item textures feature from ‘[Barely Default](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mickey-joes-relatively-improved-default)’ By — [@MushirMickeyJoe](https://www.youtube.com/@MushirMickeyJoe), A feature-packed resource pack meticulously created to enhance the overall-feel of default Minecraft without straying too far from Mojang's vision for the artstyle. 

It works by taking advantage of the new item model definitions system in the 1.21.4+ snapshots, which gives items unique textures based on its stack size.

I will continue to maintain this pack as close to the original vision of [Barely Default](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mickey-joes-relatively-improved-default). So please be patient with any and all updates.

This project currently supports Minecraft versions 1.21.5 — 1.21.6+. A backport for Optifine support is planned for the future. If it does not work or something seems broken on any particular version, please let me know via the comments section, dm, or email me at vaders.contact@yahoo.com and I'll try to fix it as soon as possible.

**———————————————————————————————————————————**
